channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Donovan Mitchell and Evan Mobley power East-leading Cavaliers to 142-105 blowout of Knicks
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Donovan Mitchell scored 27 points, Evan Mobley added 21 and the Cleveland Cavaliers bullied the New York Knicks from the start Friday night, winning 142-105 in a matchup of two of the Eastern Conference's top teams.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mark Williams' agent says center 'should have been a given an opportunity' to play for Lakers
item.description: The agent for Charlotte Hornets center Mark Williams says the Los Angeles Lakers should not have failed his client’s physical examination.
item.dc:creator: Steve Reed, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Jaguars hire Rams' James Gladstone as GM, reuniting him with coach Liam Coen
item.description: JACKSONVILLE, Fla. (AP) — The Jacksonville Jaguars hired Los Angeles Rams executive James Gladstone as their general manager Friday, reuniting him with new coach Liam Coen. Gladstone held the position of director of scouting strategy in L.A.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Yankees owner Hal Steinbrenner may support a salary cap proposal tied to payroll minimum
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — New York Yankees owner Hal Steinbrenner may support a salary cap proposal as long as it contains a provision mandating minimum payrolls.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Italian skier Brignone wins, Shiffrin takes 'big step' as 25th in her first GS race after injury
item.description: SESTRIERE, Italy (AP) — Federica Brignone overcame a recent illness to win the first World Cup giant slalom after taking gold at the Alpine skiing world championships on Friday, while Mikaela Shiffrin finished 25th in the American's first race in the discipline in nearly 12 weeks.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump vows to cut off federal funding to Maine over refusal to comply with 'No Men in Women's Sports' order
item.description: President Donald Trump announced he will cut off federal funding to Maine if it continues to defy his executive order keeping trans athletes out of women's sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Connor McDavid scores in OT to give Canada 3-2 win over United States in 4 Nations Face-Off final
item.description: Instead, the Canadian team stood at the blue line, arm in arm, player and coach, wearing their championship hats while the maple leaf flag was lowered behind the 4 Nations Face-Off trophy and the national anthem reverberated across the Americans' home ice.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Spurs star Victor Wembanyama to miss remainder of season after blood clot diagnosis
item.description: San Antonio star Victor Wembanyama's season is over after he was diagnosed with a blood clot in his right shoulder, a condition that will sideline one of the league's brightest stars and is the second massive health-related hit for the Spurs in a matter of months.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Suspects charged in connection to burglaries of several pro athletes
item.description: Seven Chilean nationals face federal charges related to the burglaries of several high profile athletes' homes.
item.dc:creator: Brian Dulle, WGN 9

item.title: Cubs announce Shota Imanaga as Opening Day starter in Tokyo
item.description: The Cubs have named their 2025 Opening Day starter, and it's about the least surprising announcement possible.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Ausar scores 21 as Utes run past K-State, 74-69
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Ezra Ausar had 21 points and Lawson Lovering posted a double-double to help Utah hold on for a 74-69 victory over Kansas State on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Northwestern golfers invited to Augusta National Women's Amateur
item.description: EVANSTON, Ill. - Northwestern is going to be well-represented at the 6th Annual Augusta National Women's Amateur Championship. Lauryn Nguyen and Elise Lee are set to the make the trip to Georgia along with NU commit Arianna Lau. "It's such a special place," noted Nguyen.
item.dc:creator: Kaitlin Sharkey, WGN 9

item.title: Stephen Curry captures MVP honors in All-Star Game at home, leads Shaq’s OGs to victory
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — The final pregame introduction belonged to none other than Stephen Curry. The big MVP trophy at the end, Curry heaved that high in the air, too, in a fitting finish to his special All-Star Game at home. His arena. His fans.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Boys Basketball: Chula Vista 58, Sweetwater 56
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Boys basketball Chula Vista at Sweetwater with the Spartans edging out the Red Devils 58-56. Both teams now 4-1 in league play with the season winding down and league title still up for grabs.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: NASCAR driver Ryan Blaney previews Daytona 500
item.description: Ryan Blaney, 2023 NASCAR Cup Series champion, joined NewsNation to talk Sunday's Daytona 500, which marks the 67th running of the event.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Suzuki and Counsell are working on their communication in spring training with the Cubs
item.description: MESA, Ariz. (AP) — Seiya Suzuki is working on his communication with Craig Counsell, and the manager says it's his fault. Suzuki joined the rest of the Chicago Cubs for their first full-squad workout of spring training on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
